---
title: "Rosalie Amelia, Lady Chichester"
---

## Rosalie Amelia, Lady Chichester

**Dates:** (1842/3-1908)

**Maiden name:** (Chamberlayne)

### Description

daughter of Thomas Chamberlayne

### Biography

She married, first (9 Feb 1865), Sir Alexander Palmer Bruce Chichester, 2nd and last Bt. (d. 1881), and, secondly (1883), Sir Arthur Chichester, 8th Bt. (d. 1898). 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
